title: CCL - Close/reopen the app
scenario: CCL (Call Control Language) setting does not persist after closing and reopening the Poly Studio Mobile app
steps: 1. Open the Poly Studio Mobile app with a connected device that supports Call Control Language (CCL).
2. Navigate to the Home screen and tap on the connected [Device Name].
4. Select a value for the CCL (Call Control Language) setting.
5. Fully close (swipe away) the Poly Studio Mobile app.
6. Reopen the Poly Studio Mobile app.
7. Navigate again to Device Settings → Advanced for the same device.
expected: The previously selected CCL setting value is still displayed and selected in Device Settings → Advanced.
